---
title: "Trees"
author: "Casey Martin"
date: "2024-11-18"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(knitr)
library(rpart.plot)
library(vip)
```

```{r}
# Remove unnescessary columns
dataset_spread <- dataset_spread %>% select(-bedrooms, -state, -source)
```

# Random Forest

```{r}
set.seed(445)

rf_spec <- rand_forest(mtry = sqrt(.cols())) |>
  set_engine("randomForest", importance = TRUE) |>
  set_mode("regression")

rf_fit <- rf_spec |>
  fit(price ~ ., data = dataset_train)

bind_cols(
  augment(rf_fit, new_data = dataset_test),
  predict(rf_fit, new_data = dataset_test)
) -> dataset_pred_rf

MSE <- (1/length(dataset_pred_rf$price))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_rf$.pred...21))^2
MSE
```

# Decision Tree

```{r}
set.seed(445)

tree_spec <- decision_tree() |>
  set_engine("rpart") |>
  set_mode("regression")

tree_fit <- tree_spec |>
  fit(price ~ ., data = dataset_train)

tree_fit

# tree_fit |>
#   augment(new_data = dataset_train) |>
#   accuracy(truth = price, estimate = .pred_class)

tree_fit |>
  extract_fit_engine() |>
  rpart.plot()
```
